title: Fix rand_mode(0) on sub-object members not preventing solver write-back

features.name: class with rand member of class type and constraint
features.description: Code should include a class with a rand member that is another class type, where the inner class member has a constraint

features.name: rand_mode_disable on nested random object member
features.description: Code should include calling rand_mode(0) on a member of a nested random object to disable randomization for that specific member

features.name: solver write_back after rand_mode_disable on nested member
features.description: Code should include a constraint solver attempting write-back to a nested member variable after rand_mode(0) was called on it, expecting the manually set value to be preserved
